errors.rootCause: Variable `lower` was used on line 50 (isDailyActivityQuestion(lower)) before its const declaration on line 63 (const lower = clean.toLowerCase()). This is a temporal dead zone — the minified bundle names it 'J', hence the error message.
errors.fix: Moved `const lower = clean.toLowerCase()` to the top of the send function, before any usage. Also reordered all handler checks to use consistent `lower` variable.

errors.error: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'replace')
errors.rootCause: Two .replace() calls on potentially undefined values: offer.stripeStatus.replace() and r.status.replace(). If a Supabase row is missing these fields, the normalizer returns safe defaults but the component still called .replace() directly without null check.
The unsafe .replace calls above caused the entire MonetizationPanel to crash during render. Without an error boundary, this showed as a blank page.
errors.fix: Fixed .replace calls + added ErrorBoundary component around all panel routes in NexusAdminUI.jsx

errors.rootCause: The backend_query handler always returned 'I do not have a live AI model configured' regardless of VITE_HERMES_CHAT_ENABLED state. This contradicted the badge showing 'Live Supabase + Model Ready'.
errors.fix: Added VITE_HERMES_CHAT_ENABLED check — returns model-ready answer when configured, honest fallback when not.

errors.error: Hermes inline drawer missing daily activity/CEO summary handlers
errors.rootCause: The inline drawer only had generic buildHermesResponse + Supabase/web enrichment. It never checked for daily activity questions, CEO summary requests, or section status questions. These were only wired in HermesChatPanel.
errors.fix: Added isDailyActivityQuestion, isCeoSummaryRequest, isSectionStatusQuestion checks at the top of the send handler, matching HermesChatPanel behavior.
